Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product information and pricing, eliminating manual product research.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email including subject line, body copy, and CTAs tailored to R1 Concepts branding.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-optimized email copy daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work each day.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the target contact list, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email distribution pipeline to segmented audiences, ensuring consistent daily engagement without manual sends.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, promotions, and brand messaging from the website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with the latest DFC inventory and offers, removing the need for manual content gathering.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with DFC-branded subject line, persuasive body copy, and product-specific calls to action.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, high-quality marketing content every day, maintaining consistent customer communication without manual copywriting effort.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Builds the email in HubSpot, targets the appropriate DFC contact lists, and sends the campaign via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Fully automates daily email deployment to DFC customer segments, driving repeat engagement and revenue with zero manual intervention.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including ticket subject, description, customer history, and priority level.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests automatically so no ticket is missed and response times are dramatically reduced.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (returns, warranty, fitment, shipping) and drafts a context-aware reply for the support team to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and initial response drafting time by automating classification and generating accurate, on-brand reply drafts.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification, attaches the draft reply as a note, and adjusts ticket status for agent review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Support reps open pre-categorized tickets with ready-to-send replies, enabling faster resolution and more consistent customer experiences.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts with issue properties.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Automatically aggregates all customer-reported product issues from Amazon inserts, eliminating manual data extraction from HubSpot.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each issue submission into a structured Google Sheet with columns for issue type, product, date, and customer details for team analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, filterable dashboard of customer issues to spot trends, reduce return rates, and improve product quality.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Identifies high-intent DFC customers browsing competitor or partner products in real time, surfacing warm leads before they go cold.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alert messages to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams channel and email with customer details and activity summary.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Sales reps can immediately act on live buying signals, dramatically increasing outreach timing and conversion rates on active accounts.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chat agent on the R1 Concepts website, answering product questions, order status inquiries, and fitment checks.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will deflect routine support inquiries and provide instant answers 24/7, reducing support ticket volume and improving customer satisfaction.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will process customer questions using AI to match queries against product data, order records, and FAQs to generate accurate responses.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable instant, knowledgeable self-service for customers, freeing up human agents for complex issues and reducing average resolution time.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand's niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to find creators that keyword-specific platform searches alone would miss.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves creator profile details, follower counts, engagement metrics, content topics, and contact information from YouTube, Instagram, and Google.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds comprehensive creator profiles with real engagement data, replacing hours of manual research across multiple platforms.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes discovered creator profiles against brand criteria to rank relevance, summarize content themes, and flag top candidates for outreach.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw discovery data into an actionable shortlist of high-potential creators, dramatically accelerating the influencer sourcing pipeline.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche alignment, content quality, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective manual vetting with consistent, data-driven scoring so the team invests outreach effort only in the highest-value creators.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, brand guidelines, and past campaign prompts from Google Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach messaging stays consistent with proven sequences and brand voice, building on institutional knowledge rather than starting from scratch.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and customized talking points.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale, increasing creator response rates while eliminating the bottleneck of manually writing individual emails.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators and logs the send in the outreach pipeline.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates email delivery and tracking so the team can run large-scale creator campaigns without manually sending or tracking hundreds of emails.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies, retrieves full conversation threads, and identifies new responses requiring follow-up.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator reply is missed and provides full conversation context for intelligent, timely follow-ups.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes creator responses using learned negotiation patterns and past influencer conversations to draft contextual follow-up replies including rate negotiations and deal terms.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains momentum in creator negotiations with fast, intelligent responses informed by historical deal patterns, reducing time-to-close on partnerships.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted follow-up reply via Gmail and logs the conversation progress and deal status in Google Drive for team visibility.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps the negotiation pipeline moving automatically while building a knowledge base of creator interactions that improves future outreach and deal-making.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying products.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle datasets and availability lists, ensuring accurate weekly load sheet generation without human error.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Monitors Teams channels for updated source files or notifications related to weekly MHM vehicle selections and coordinates workflow triggers.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the automation in sync with team decisions and file updates, removing the need to manually check for new vehicle selections each week.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends the Must Have Monday email campaign with the generated load sheet and sales sheet attachments to the DFC distribution list.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Delivers polished, data-accurate MHM emails every Monday without manual email building, ensuring consistent outreach cadence to dealers and distributors.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails, tailored to DFC's First to Market branding and product details.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces high-quality marketing copy in seconds rather than hours, enabling rapid turnaround on new product launch communications.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates draft First to Market email campaigns in HubSpot with AI-generated copy, sales sheet assets, and proper segmentation for new product launches and monthly recaps.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Eliminates repetitive email setup in HubSpot, ensuring each product launch gets a professionally structured draft ready for quick review and send.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including email performance, contact growth, and campaign analytics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically gathers CRM performance data that would otherwise require manual export and compilation from multiple HubSpot reports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls website traffic data from GA4, search performance from Google Search Console, and SMS campaign metrics from Attentive for the monthly reporting window.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates multi-platform analytics into a single data pipeline, saving significant time spent logging into each platform and manually extracting numbers.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with formatted metrics, charts, and performance summaries from all data sources.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Transforms raw data into presentation-ready slides automatically, eliminating tedious manual slide formatting and ensuring consistent month-over-month reporting.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current search performance and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms relative to competitors in the brake parts space.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-value keyword opportunities backed by real search data, ensuring content targets terms with actual traffic potential rather than guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog articles targeting identified keyword gaps, structured with proper headings, internal linking suggestions, and keyword placement.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready long-form content at scale, dramatically accelerating the content production pipeline that would take a writer hours per article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes completed blog posts to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization including meta titles, descriptions, and readability scoring.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Automates the entire publishing workflow end-to-end, ensuring every post is SEO-optimized at publish time and maintaining a consistent content cadence.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Processes vendor purchase order exports from Dream ERP, extracting open PO data including vendor details, order dates, line items, and fulfillment status.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual ERP data extraction and formatting, ensuring all open POs are captured accurately for follow-up without missed orders.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads processed PO data to HubSpot, creating or updating vendor records and triggering automated chase email sequences for outstanding orders.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the entire vendor follow-up process, reducing days of manual email writing and ensuring no overdue purchase order falls through the cracks.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number data and the New Availability Guide as inputs via a browser-based interface, matching parts against available inventory.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Provides an instant, no-install matching tool that anyone on the team can use without technical setup or access to external systems.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Generates and exports a formatted DFC load sheet as an Excel file with matched products, pricing, and part details ready for distribution.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Produces clean, formatted Excel load sheets in seconds, replacing manual spreadsheet assembly and ensuring consistent formatting across all weekly outputs.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Navigates the Attentive dashboard via Chrome browser automation, locates and clones the previous week's MHM SMS campaign as a template for the new week.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Eliminates repetitive manual campaign setup in Attentive, maintaining brand consistency while saving time on weekly SMS creation.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the new vehicle name, adjusts the scheduled send time, and finalizes the campaign for the weekly MHM SMS blast.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Ensures accurate, on-time weekly SMS campaigns with updated vehicle details, removing the risk of sending outdated information or missing the send window.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts and analyzes DFC sales data including order history, customer purchase patterns, product performance, and revenue trends for segmentation.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Transforms raw ERP sales data into actionable customer intelligence, enabling targeted marketing that would be impossible to derive manually at scale.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Creates customer segments and triggers automated email campaigns including reorder reminders, cross-sell recommendations, and win-back sequences based on analyzed sales data.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Drives incremental revenue through timely, data-driven outreach that re-engages lapsed customers and prompts reorders at optimal intervals without manual effort.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends SMS campaigns aligned with email automation for high-priority segments, reinforcing reorder and win-back messaging through a second channel.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Increases campaign reach and response rates by adding SMS touchpoints to email-only workflows, capturing customers who are more responsive to text messages.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the latest Super Session Saturday content and download link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Automates file detection so the workflow triggers instantly upon upload, eliminating the need for manual handoffs or reminder emails between team members.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a hosted download link to embed in the outgoing email campaign.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures the download link is properly hosted and trackable within HubSpot, enabling click analytics on file downloads.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting auto shops, distributors, and fleet managers with topics aligned to DFC's product lines and industry keywords.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces specialized B2B content at scale that speaks directly to DFC's target buyer personas, accelerating organic search growth in a competitive aftermarket space.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes finalized blog posts to the DFC WordPress site with proper SEO formatting, categories, tags, and structured metadata for search engine indexing.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Maintains a steady publishing cadence of optimized B2B content, building DFC's domain authority and organic visibility among key commercial buyer segments.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Pulls the latest Friction Friday video details including title, description, embed URL, and thumbnail each week.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Auto-generates a blog post with the embedded video, SEO metadata, and formatted recap content.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Triggers a branded email campaign to the Friction Friday subscriber list with the video link, blog post URL, and call-to-action.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Drives immediate engagement with each new episode and nurtures the DFC audience without any manual email build or list management.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Sends a short SMS notification to opted-in contacts alerting them that a new Friction Friday episode is live with a direct link.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts workflows including site visit triggers, welcome series sequences, and enrollment criteria for gaps and inefficiencies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies missed enrollment opportunities, redundant triggers, and broken sequences so leads stop falling through the cracks.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Optimizes and reconfigures site visit triggers, welcome series timing, and segmentation logic based on audit findings.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Improves lead nurture conversion rates and ensures every new site visitor and contact enters the right journey at the right time.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs along with associated contact details, order history flags, and account status from the ERP database.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a single source of truth for customer identity that bridges the sales and marketing systems together.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps and syncs each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record, creating custom properties for DFC sales automation workflows.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping the bomb file project requirements, defining data sources, output formats, and integration points needed for execution.
Bomb File Project.impact: Proper planning prevents rework and ensures the final automation is built to spec with clearly defined success criteria from day one.

Image Mapping Project for Dream.action: Planning the image mapping structure to associate product images with the correct SKUs and catalog entries inside Dream ERP.

Claudia Automation.action: Defining the scope, triggers, and desired outcomes for the Claudia automation project during the planning phase.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Scoping the automated generation and delivery workflow for Shirly invoice PDFs, including data inputs, template design, and distribution method.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects and pulls the latest R1 Concepts weekly video including title, description, thumbnail, and embed code.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Automatically captures each new video release so no episode is missed and downstream content creation begins instantly.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Creates and publishes an R1-branded blog post featuring the embedded video, formatted recap, and SEO-optimized metadata.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Drives organic search traffic to R1's site and gives every video a permanent, indexable home without manual content work.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends a weekly email campaign to the R1 subscriber list featuring the new video, blog link, and relevant product CTAs.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Keeps the R1 audience engaged weekly and drives traffic to both the blog and YouTube channel without manual email builds.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Fires an SMS alert to opted-in R1 contacts notifying them of the new weekly video with a direct link.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Maximizes same-day viewership through high-open-rate SMS and reaches the mobile audience who may miss email.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance metrics across Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including spend, ROAS, CPA, impressions, and conversions.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Centralizes cross-platform ad data automatically, eliminating 1–2 hours of manual data pulling from three separate dashboards every week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares current week metrics against the previous month's averages, identifies anomalies, and generates a plain-English performance summary with callouts.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Surfaces underperforming and overperforming channels instantly, giving the team actionable insight without manual spreadsheet analysis.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Delivers the formatted weekly checkup report to the team's inbox with clear performance comparisons and highlighted areas of concern.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures every stakeholder starts the week informed on paid channel health without logging into any ad platform or requesting a report.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Pulls full-month performance data across Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including total spend, revenue, ROAS, CPA, and key KPIs.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Automates the most tedious part of end-of-month reporting by aggregating all paid channel data in one pull instead of three manual exports.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Analyzes the full month's data, generates a narrative summary with key wins, losses, and trends, and formats it specifically for end-of-month presentation slides.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Transforms raw data into slide-ready insights in minutes, saving hours of analyst time and ensuring consistent, professional reporting every month.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Sends the completed monthly report to stakeholders formatted and ready to paste into the end-of-month slide deck.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Delivers presentation-ready content directly to decision-makers' inboxes, removing the back-and-forth of report review and reformatting.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Pulls a list of customers who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration form.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Ensures every warranty registrant is captured for retargeting without manual list exports, saving hours of weekly data wrangling.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates, deduplicates, and formats the customer list to match Meta's custom audience upload requirements.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Eliminates formatting errors and duplicate entries that would reduce match rates, ensuring maximum audience coverage on Meta.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Uploads the cleaned customer list as a custom audience for ad targeting and lookalike expansion.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Warranty customers are automatically retargeted with relevant offers, increasing repeat purchase rates and ROAS without any manual audience management.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Extracts active ad copy, performance metrics, and creative details from both Meta and TikTok ad accounts.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Centralizes cross-platform ad performance data in one place, eliminating the need to manually pull reports from each platform separately.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Analyzes each ad's copy against performance benchmarks, identifies underperformers, and generates specific rewrite recommendations.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Provides actionable, data-backed copy improvement suggestions in minutes instead of hours of manual creative review by the paid media team.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report with flagged ads and copy recommendations to the paid social team.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Ensures the team receives a clear, prioritized action list they can immediately act on, accelerating the creative optimization cycle.

Asana Agent.action: Retrieves tasks, due dates, assignees, and project status updates from Asana workspaces.
Asana Agent.impact: Automatically surfaces task and project data without requiring team members to log into Asana for status checks.

Asana Agent.action: Summarizes task statuses, highlights overdue or at-risk items, and drafts a concise update or action-needed notification.
Asana Agent.impact: Turns raw project data into a digestible summary, saving managers time parsing through dozens of individual tasks.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the formatted task summary and alerts to relevant stakeholders via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps the team informed on project health passively, reducing missed deadlines and unnecessary status meetings.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting transcripts and notes from media team meetings on Teams.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards or stages the raw meeting transcript and any supplemental notes for AI processing.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a reliable handoff of meeting content into the automation pipeline without manual copy-pasting.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses the meeting transcript to extract action items, assignees, deadlines, and key decisions.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Converts a lengthy meeting recording into structured, assignable tasks in seconds, dramatically reducing post-meeting admin work.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates new tasks in Asana with the extracted action items, assignees, and due dates from the meeting.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Guarantees every meeting commitment becomes a tracked, assigned task — eliminating the gap between discussion and execution.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls active search ad copy, headlines, descriptions, and performance metrics from the Google Ads account.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Automates the tedious export and review of search ad data, ensuring no underperforming ad is overlooked.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Evaluates each search ad's copy effectiveness against performance data, flags underperformers, and generates improved headline and description alternatives.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers expert-level copy audit and recommendations in minutes, enabling faster optimization cycles and higher ad quality scores.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Emails a structured audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy changes to the search marketing team.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Gives the team a ready-to-implement optimization plan, reducing the gap between identifying and fixing weak ad copy.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the latest data from the Agent Tracker sheet, including agent names, statuses, metrics, and update logs.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Pulls live tracking data without anyone needing to manually compile or reformat the spreadsheet for distribution.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Formats the raw tracker data into a clean, easy-to-read weekly summary with highlights and key changes.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the relevant stakeholders via email.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps leadership and the team consistently informed on agent progress without anyone having to manually write or send updates.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, etc.) through a HubSpot form to initiate the catalog request.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Provides a simple, standardized intake process so requests are captured cleanly without back-and-forth emails or misinterpreted specs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the DFC product catalog and inventory system to identify what parts are stocked for the submitted vehicle and what gaps exist.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly cross-references vehicle specs against live inventory, replacing hours of manual catalog lookups across multiple systems.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the matched and missing parts data into a clean, structured Excel-ready output with organized columns and labels.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to the requestor's inbox without any manual file creation or distribution, fully automating the end-to-end workflow.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Ingests the weekly backorder report and enriches each line item with live inventory status — on hand, on order, or in transit — from the Dream system.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces the current process of a dozen people doing independent lookups by centralizing all inventory status data into a single enriched report automatically.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Flags dead-end parts with no available source, prioritizes critical backorders, and generates draft customer communication for each affected order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates hours of manual triage and email drafting, ensuring customers are proactively notified and no dead-end part slips through the cracks.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends the enriched backorder report and draft customer communications to the relevant team members for review and dispatch.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Accelerates customer response times from days to hours and gives the team ready-to-send messages instead of starting communications from scratch.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing and recording competitor catalog data, ensuring complete and up-to-date market coverage.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlaps and gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC has competitive coverage and where product development or sourcing opportunities exist, without manual comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Runs automated customer outreach to gather demand data for two-piece rotor applications identified in the catalog.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates all scraped data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive reference document that combines market data, internal inventory, and demand signals — ready for strategic decision-making.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok accounts for specific flagged phrases or terms on demand.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly audits hundreds of live ads for compliance or brand issues, replacing the need for manual ad-by-ad review across multiple platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Matches the specified phrases against all extracted ad copy and compiles a flagged list noting the exact field and copy where each match was found.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list with ad names, fields, and matching copy to the requesting team member.
